def make_cookie_header
      return nil if cookie_jar.nil?

      arr = cookie_jar.cookies(url)
      return nil if arr.empty?

      return HTTP::Cookie.cookie_value(arr)
    end

def report(expected_example_count)
      start(expected_example_count)
      begin
        yield self
      ensure
        finish
      end
    end

unless locals
        locals = thread[:concurrent_fiber_locals] = []
        weak_synchronize do
          @all_arrays[locals.object_id] = locals
        end
        # When the fiber goes out of scope, we should delete the associated locals:
        ObjectSpace.define_finalizer(Fiber.current, thread_fiber_finalizer(locals.object_id))
      end

if matching_version == to_version
                color = :green
              elsif from_version == matching_version
                color = :red
              end

if klass = concrete_class_from_params(params)
        klass.new(name, params, podfile_path, can_cache)
      else
        msg = "Unknown external source parameters for `#{name}`: `#{params}`"
        raise Informative, msg
      end

if params.key?(:podspec)
        PodspecSource
      elsif params.key?(:path)
        PathSource
      elsif Downloader.strategy_from_options(params)
        DownloaderSource
      end

if @prev_chunk.size + line.size >= MAX_CHUNK_HEADER_SIZE
            raise HttpParserError, "maximum size of chunk header exceeded"
          end

if spec.default_gem?
      say "'#{name}' is a default gem and can't be opened."
      return false
    end

if specs.empty?
      alert_error "No gem matching '#{dep}' found"
      terminate_interaction 1
    end

if source
        sources = Gem::SourceList.from [source]

        Gem::SpecFetcher.new sources
      else
        Gem::SpecFetcher.fetcher
      end

if @bindir
      Array(executables).map {|e| File.join(@bindir, e) }
    else
      executables
    end

def deep_merge_hashes!(target, overwrite)
      merge_values(target, overwrite)
      merge_default_proc(target, overwrite)
      duplicate_frozen_values(target)

      target
    end

if `/usr/bin/xcrun clang 2>&1` =~ /license/ && !$?.success?
        raise Informative, 'You have not agreed to the Xcode license, which ' \
          'you must do to use CocoaPods. Agree to the license by running: ' \
          '`xcodebuild -license`.'
      end

module Options
          def options
            [
              ['--project-directory=/project/dir/', 'The path to the root of the project directory'],
            ].concat(super)
          end
        end

if @project_directory && !@project_directory.directory?
            raise Informative, "`#{@project_directory}` is not a valid directory."
          end

module Options
          def options
            [
              ['--no-repo-update', 'Skip running `pod repo update` before install'],
            ].concat(super)
          end
        end

unless config.sandbox.specification(dep.root_name)
            raise Informative, 'You must run `pod install` first to ensure that the ' \
              "podspec for `#{dep.root_name}` has been fetched."
          end

if @name == 'trunk'
            raise Informative,
                  "Repo name `trunk` is reserved for CocoaPods' main spec repo accessed via CDN."
          end

unless @source && @source.repo.directory?
            raise Informative,
                  "Unable to find the `#{@repo}` repo. " \
                  'If it has not yet been cloned, add it via `pod repo add`.'
          end

if output_path.exist? && !@allow_overwrite
              raise Informative, "#{spec} already exists and overwriting has been disabled."
            end

unless validator.validated?
          raise Informative, "The `#{name}` pod failed to validate due to #{validator.failure_reason}:\n#{validator.results_message}"
        end

class IPC < Command
      self.abstract_command = true
      self.summary = 'Inter-process communication'

      def output_pipe
        STDOUT
      end
    end

unless @clean
              UI.puts "Pods workspace available at `#{validator.validation_dir}/App.xcworkspace` for inspection."
              UI.puts
            end

if podspecs.count.zero?
              raise Informative, 'Unable to find a podspec in the working ' \
                'directory'
            end

if @name == 'master'
            raise Informative,
                  'To setup the master specs repo, please run `pod setup`.'
          end

unless block
      raise ArgumentError, "no block given", ParseError.filter_backtrace(caller)
    end

module Pod
  class Command
    class Lib < Command
      self.abstract_command = true
      self.summary = 'Develop pods'
    end
  end
end

def execute_flow_block(block, current_platform, lane, parameters)
      # Call the platform specific block and default back to the general one
      block[current_platform].call(lane, parameters) if block[current_platform] && current_platform
      block[nil].call(lane, parameters) if block[nil]
    end

if @pod_name.nil? && !@wipe_all
            # Security measure, to avoid removing the pod cache too agressively by mistake
            help! 'You should either specify a pod name or use the --all flag'
          end

class BeforeHook < Hook
        def run(example)
          example.instance_exec(example, &block)
        end

module Handler
      module Puma
        class << self
          include ::Puma::RackHandler
        end
      end
      register :puma, Puma
    end

if file.respond_to?(:write)
      file.write(source)
      file.rewind
      file = file.path
    end

if @clean
                message << "\nYou can use the `--no-clean` option to inspect " \
                  'any issue.'
              end

if downloader.options_specific?
        params
      else
        downloader.checkout_options
      end

if options[:pipe_format]
      display_pipe specs
    else
      display_readable specs, reverse
    end

if defined?(yield)
          yield(cursor)
        elsif type == :insert
          last_insert_id(conn, opts)
        else
          r
        end

module Bundler
  def self.require_thor_actions
    require_relative "vendor/thor/lib/thor/actions"
  end
end

class CGI
  module Escape; end
  include Escape
  extend Escape
  module EscapeExt; end # :nodoc:
end

class Command
    class Lib < Command
      self.abstract_command = true
      self.summary = 'Develop pods'
    end
  end
